name: Blue Owl Capital Corp
summary: PART I Our Company Blue Owl Capital Corporation was formed on October 15, 2015, as a corporation under the laws of the State of Maryland. Our investment objective is to generate current income, and to a lesser extent, capital appreciation by targeting investment opportunities with favorable risk-adjusted returns. Our investment strategy focuses on primarily originating and making loans to, and making debt and equity investments in, U.S. middle-market companies. Within this space, we predominantl...
